remainingL5Work.capability: Custom domains, DNS ownership, TLS, canonical
PITR, retention, legal hold, data residency
Data governance: catalog, lineage, classification, PII, DSR/GDPR
Object storage + tenant prefixes + signed URLs

Compliance reports, access reviews, evidence packs
API docs, developer portal, SDKs, rate limits

Browser telemetry (Grafana Faro RUM + browser-to-BFF tracing)

restartOrReconnectEvidence.mechanism: pg_terminate_backend on a proof-owned Postgres connection
restartOrReconnectEvidence.limitation: container restart is intentionally not used inside the proof runner; forced backend termination exercises reconnect/recovery without disrupting other tests

observabilityEvidence.note: This L5a pilot emits correlated audit, metric, trace, and log evidence from the proof harness; it does not claim observed substrate telemetry.

scenariosRun: Postgres timeout without partial identity/access mutation
retry after transient identity/access substrate failure
recovery and state preservation after local substrate failures
scenariosPassed: Postgres timeout without partial identity/access mutation
retry after transient identity/access substrate failure
recovery and state preservation after local substrate failures
localResilienceEvidence.baselineOperation: create user, link Keycloak identity, insert membership, resolve membership-backed session
localResilienceEvidence.failureInjected: Postgres backend termination, transient connection failure, unavailable identity pool

postgres.limitation: forced backend termination used instead of container restart

keycloak.retryStrategy: bounded readiness retry is operator-triggered; baseline remained ok
